meta.homeTitle: Laguna Escondida — Sport Fishing & Country Restaurant in Marinilla, Antioquia
meta.homeDescription: Fish 5 species and dine by the lake. Country restaurant with Yamú, Doradas, Cachama, Red Tilapia and Nilótica in Marinilla. 1 hour from Medellín.
meta.blogTitle: Blog — Laguna Escondida | Fishing, Food & Nature
meta.blogDescription: Fishing guides, fresh fish recipes and things to do in Eastern Antioquia. Learn about sport fishing and country cuisine.

hero.eyebrow: Country restaurant and sport fishing in Vereda La Primavera, Marinilla.
hero.subheadline: Country restaurant and sport fishing in Marinilla, Antioquia. Yamú, Doradas, Cachama, Red Tilapia and Nilótica — all in one place.
hero.bgAlt: View of the sport fishing lake from the dining area at Laguna Escondida in Marinilla, Antioquia
hero.waMessage: Hi, I'd like to book a visit at Laguna Escondida
hero.houseNote: "As the afternoon fades the lake turns to a mirror — the best moment to light the dining room fireplace and wait."

intro.eyebrow: One place, three ways to linger
intro.heading: Antioquian country hospitality, without rush.
intro.lead: Laguna Escondida is a country restaurant with a private sport fishing lake in Vereda La Primavera, Marinilla. Five species swim in the lake. The kitchen works with fresh ingredients from Eastern Antioquia. Built in bamboo, with a direct view of the water.
intro.body: We welcome families, couples and groups looking to disconnect without going far: 1 hour from Medellín via the Medellín-Bogotá highway.

experiences.heading: Three ways to meet the lake.
experiences.subtitle: Fish, dine and celebrate — each experience stands on its own or combine all three in a single day.

cards.label: 01 / Fish
cards.title: Sport fishing
cards.description: A lake with 5 fish species: Yamu, Doradas, Cachama, Red Tilapia and Nile Tilapia. The widest variety in Eastern Antioquia.
cards.imageAlt: Angler at the private lake of Laguna Escondida in Marinilla, Antioquia

cards.label: 02 / Eat
cards.title: Country dining room
cards.description: Country restaurant with a direct view of the lake. Fried Yamú, Tilapia, Doradas — fresh cooking with the same fish from the lake. Bamboo construction, tables with a view of the water.
cards.imageAlt: Fresh fish plate with a view of the lake at Laguna Escondida

cards.label: 03 / Celebrate
cards.title: Private events
cards.description: Birthdays, gender reveals and gatherings with a private kiosk by the lake. Up to 60 guests, exclusive use, country setting — without the noise of an events hall.
cards.imageAlt: Private event kiosk overlooking the lake at Laguna Escondida

fishSpecies.heading: Five species, each with its season.
fishSpecies.subtitle: While most trout farms in Eastern Antioquia only offer trout, at Laguna Escondida you can fish 5 different species. This variety makes every visit a unique experience — for anglers of all levels.

gallery.heading: What's a day like at Laguna Escondida?
gallery.subtitle: Bamboo construction, a lake surrounded by nature, and fresh dishes served with a view of the water. This is Laguna Escondida in Marinilla, Antioquia.

reviews.heading: 4.6 on Google Maps · Families, couples and anglers who came back to tell the story.

items.text: Excellent place, the food was delicious and the fishing was incredible. The kids didn't want to leave. We'll be back soon.
items.author: Google Maps customer

items.text: I had never fished Yamu before. It was a unique experience being able to fish something other than trout. The place is beautiful and peaceful.
items.author: Google Maps customer

items.text: We celebrated my son's birthday at the private kiosk. First-class service, delicious food and the kids fished all day.
items.author: Google Maps customer

location.heading: How to get to Laguna Escondida?
location.subtitle: We are in Vereda La Primavera, Marinilla, Antioquia. From the main square in Marinilla, take the road toward Hogar Infantil Semillitas and follow it up to La Primavera.
location.mapTitle: Laguna Escondida location on Google Maps
location.fromMedellinDesc: Via the Medellín-Bogotá highway to Marinilla. Estimated time: 1 hour.
location.fromRionegroDesc: Direct road to Marinilla. Estimated time: 15 minutes.
location.lostHint: Lost? Message us on WhatsApp and we'll send you the exact location.

blog.heading: Stories of fishing, recipes from the lake and things to do in Eastern Antioquia.
blog.categoryEmptyState: No articles in this category yet.

ctaBand.eyebrow: The lake is waiting this weekend
ctaBand.heading: Sundays and holidays fill up fast. Reserve your spot and arrive without a rush.

footer.tagline: "A place to stay still — in a country that never does."
footer.description: Country restaurant and sport fishing in Marinilla, Antioquia. 5 fish species, fresh food and events by the lake.
footer.designedNote: Site designed with calm · Marinilla, Antioquia
